description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable image with the docker:dind service and defines a CONTAINER_IMAGE variable set to registry.gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_PATH. Include a before_script that installs curl via apk and logs into the GitLab Container Registry using the CI job token. Add a build job in the build stage that runs "docker pull $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest || true" then "docker build --cache-from $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest --tag $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest .". The pipeline has no additional stages, caches, artifacts, or rules.
